papers.title_en: A Measurement-Calibrated AI-Assisted Digital Twin for Terahertz Wireless Data Centers
papers.authors: Mingjie Zhu, Yejian Lyu, Ziming Yu, Chong Han
papers.evidence: 用于无线数据中心的测量校准数字孪生
papers.tldr: 针对太赫兹（THz）无线数据中心信道建模难的问题，本文提出了一种结合实测校准与AI辅助的数字孪生（DT）框架。该框架集成了300 GHz信道测量、射线追踪（RT）仿真及隐式神经场（INF）建模，通过RT校准的INF构建连续射频场，有效解决了非视距（NLoS）区域的预测难题，为无线数据中心提供了系统级的性能评估与决策支持。
papers.abstract_en: Terahertz (THz) wireless communication has emerged as a promising solution for future data center interconnects; however, accurate channel characterization and system-level performance evaluation in complex indoor environments remain challenging. In this work, a measurement-calibrated AI-assisted digital twin (DT) framework is developed for THz wireless data centers by tightly integrating channel measurements, ray-tracing (RT), and implicit neural field (INF) modeling. Specifically, channel measurements are first conducted using a vector network analyzer at 300 GHz under both line-of-sight (LoS) and non-line-of-sight (NLoS) scenarios. RT simulations performed on the Sionna platform capture the dominant multipath structures and show good consistency with measured results. Building upon measurement and RT data, an RT-conditioned INF is developed to construct a continuous radio-frequency (RF) field representation, enabling accurate prediction in RT-missing NLoS regions. The comprehensive RF map generated by DT can provide system-level analysis and decisions for wireless data centers.
